title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
